mapper.insert: INSERT INTO package_upload_sessions (upload_id, file_name, package_format, file_size, chunk_size, total_chunks, uploaded_chunk_count, uploaded_chunks, expected_sha256, actual_sha256, storage_path, signature_algorithm, signature_value, signature_status, signature_verified_at, status, error_message, created_by, created_at, updated_at, completed_at) VALUES (#{uploadId}, #{fileName}, #{packageFormat}, #{fileSize}, #{chunkSize}, #{totalChunks}, #{uploadedChunkCount}, CAST(#{uploadedChunks} AS JSON), #{expectedSha256}, #{actualSha256}, #{storagePath}, #{signatureAlgorithm}, #{signatureValue}, #{signatureStatus}, #{signatureVerifiedAt}, #{status}, #{errorMessage}, #{createdBy}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{completedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT upload_id, file_name, package_format, file_size, chunk_size, total_chunks, uploaded_chunk_count, uploaded_chunks, expected_sha256, actual_sha256, storage_path, signature_algorithm, signature_value, signature_status, signature_verified_at, status, error_message, created_by, created_at, updated_at, completed_at FROM package_upload_sessions WHERE upload_id = #{uploadId} LIMIT 1

SELECT upload_id, file_name, package_format, file_size, chunk_size, total_chunks, uploaded_chunk_count, uploaded_chunks, expected_sha256, actual_sha256, storage_path, signature_algorithm, signature_value, signature_status, signature_verified_at, status, error_message, created_by, created_at, updated_at, completed_at FROM package_upload_sessions WHERE upload_id = #{uploadId} LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE

SELECT upload_id, file_name, package_format, file_size, chunk_size, total_chunks, uploaded_chunk_count, uploaded_chunks, expected_sha256, actual_sha256, storage_path, signature_algorithm, signature_value, signature_status, signature_verified_at, status, error_message, created_by, created_at, updated_at, completed_at FROM package_upload_sessions WHERE status IN (0, 4) AND updated_at < #{cutoff} ORDER BY updated_at ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE package_upload_sessions SET uploaded_chunks = CAST(#{uploadedChunks} AS JSON), uploaded_chunk_count = #{uploadedChunkCount}, updated_at = NOW(3) WHERE upload_id = #{uploadId} AND status = 0
UPDATE package_upload_sessions SET status = 4, updated_at = NOW(3) WHERE upload_id = #{uploadId} AND status = 0

UPDATE package_upload_sessions SET actual_sha256 = #{actualSha256}, storage_path = #{storagePath}, signature_algorithm = #{signatureAlgorithm}, signature_value = #{signatureValue}, signature_status = #{signatureStatus}, signature_verified_at = #{signatureVerifiedAt}, status = 1, error_message = NULL, completed_at = #{completedAt}, updated_at = #{completedAt} WHERE upload_id = #{uploadId} AND status = 4
UPDATE package_upload_sessions SET status = 2, updated_at = NOW(3) WHERE upload_id = #{uploadId} AND status = 1
UPDATE package_upload_sessions SET status = 3, error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = NOW(3) WHERE upload_id = #{uploadId} AND status IN (0, 4)
UPDATE package_upload_sessions SET status = 3, error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = NOW(3) WHERE upload_id = #{uploadId} AND status IN (0, 4) AND updated_at < #{cutoff}
